runners.formComment: Last time finished last over 400m at Warragul beaten 24 lengths (25.13) behind Paw Vanna in a Maiden on March 26. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

runners.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Bottom Up - Maiden on April 6 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Paw Ula, beaten 9 lengths (23.38). Racing well and has to be included.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 7th in a Maiden on March 28 over 400m at this track behind Paw Yatana beaten 12 lengths (23.52). Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 9 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Aston Sunshine beaten 10 lengths (22.74) in a Maiden. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Warrnambool, the latest when beaten 6 lengths behind Paw Ula over 390m. Tested under these conditions.

runners.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 10 over 350m at Healesville in a Maiden. Can't recommend him in this.

runners.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fifth over 400m at this track, beaten 14 lengths. Other runners look much more appealing.
